description.value: These blades come in a variety of shapes and styles, but they are typically 2 feet long.

Adventurers who don't wear armor travel in durable clothing. Though it's not armor and uses your unarmored defense proficiency, it still has a Dex Cap and can grant an item bonus to AC if etched with potency runes.

Blue Viper carries the following infused items: 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.jC8GmH0Un6vDxdMj]{Acid Flask (Greater)}, 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.n5yTlTs63o53n3k6]{Alchemist's Fire (Greater)}, 6 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Cc4SokzVBoBCkHId]{Blightburn Resin}, 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.r2iTRbt1zpkAqHj2]{Bottled Lightning (Greater)}, 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.87AzvRja9uQOLJCC]{Deathcap Powder}, 4 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.mYozcVg9fQY6zO7C]{Elixir of Life (Greater)}, 2 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.intVPcEzbE9o4NQd]{Frost Vial (Greater)}, 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.76T49dJYfxIrPvQe]{Malyass Root Paste}, 9 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.iRDCa4OVSTGUD3vi]{Purple Worm Venom}, 6 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.Wjkw0lEUOhypYvzo]{Shadow Essence}, and 3 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.Item.oOXvk18K4izaJzG7]{Spider Root}. These items last for 24 hours, or until the next time Blue Viper makes his daily preparations.

Trigger A creature adjacent to Blue Viper hits him with a melee unarmed Strike.

Effect The triggering creature is exposed to @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-srd.mamIdMfPguGM8QV7]{Weeping Midnight}. This consumes the poison, and Blue Viper can't use Poisoned Coat again until he spends 10 minutes applying one dose of contact or injury poison to his clothing.

When Blue Viper successfully Strikes an @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} creature with a poisoned weapon or exposes an off-guard creature to an inhaled poison, the creature takes a -2 circumstance penalty to its initial save against that poison.

Requirements Blue Viper is holding a contact or injury poison.

Effect Blue Viper swigs the poison and sprays it out of his mouth, affecting a @Template[cone|distance:15]. Blue Viper isn't exposed to the poison. All creatures in the cone are immediately exposed to the poison and each creature must attempt a Fortitude save against the poison.
Blue Viper's infused poisons have a DC of 37.
Blue Viper Interacts to draw an injury poison and applies it to a weapon he is holding.

Blue Viper Interacts to draw an inhaled poison, deploys the poison in a smoke cloud that provides concealment in a @Template[emanation|distance:5], then @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.actionspf2e.Item.VMozDqMMuK5kpoX4]{Sneaks} up to his Speed. He is not exposed to the inhaled poison.

Alchemists have refined the devastatingly allergenic pollen of the widow orchid to create this venom, which swiftly causes the victim's eyes to leak mucus and swell shut.

Activate 3 Interact (Injury)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:36]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[6d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[7d6[poison]] damage, dazzled, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[8d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} (1 round)

Alchemists have refined the devastatingly allergenic pollen of the widow orchid to create this venom, which swiftly causes the victim's eyes to leak mucus and swell shut.

Activate 3 Interact (Injury)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:36]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[6d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.TkIyaNPgTZFBCCuh]{Dazzled} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[7d6[poison]] damage, dazzled, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.fesd1n5eVhpCSS18]{Sickened 1} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[8d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.XgEqL1kFApUbl5Z2]{Blinded} (1 round)

Activate A Strike

Alchemist's fire is a combination of volatile liquids that ignite when exposed to air. Alchemist's fire deals 3d8 fire damage, 3 persistent fire damage, and 3 fire splash damage. You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls.

Activate A Strike

Bottled lightning is packed with volatile reagents that create a blast of electricity when they are exposed to air. Bottled lightning deals 3d6 electricity damage and 3 electricity splash damage. On a hit, the target becomes @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} until the start of your next turn. You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls.

Fumes from the forges of Hell drain health and strength alike.

Activate A (manipulate)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:36]

Onset 1 round

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[7d8[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 1} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[8d8[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[10d8[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 3} (1 round)

Activate 2 (manipulate)

This poison is infamous for making the victim's blood vessels glow with a bright blue light before painfully bursting.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:37]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[10d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[12d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[14d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Activate 2 (manipulate)

The spores of a certain mushrooms, if carefully collected and suspended in a properly mixed alchemical fluid, can kill those near death. If a creature is reduced to 0 Hit Points while under the effect of execution powder, it must succeed at a @Check[will|dc:34] save or die (this is a death effect). If a creature dies from execution powder, the spores from their last breath alight on a random creature adjacent to the victim, granting that creature 20 temporary Hit Points and a +1 status bonus to attack and damage rolls for 10 minutes.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:34]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[7d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[9d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[12d6[poison]] damage (1 round)

Activate A (manipulate)

Elixirs of life accelerate a living creature's natural healing processes and immune system. Upon drinking this elixir, you regain @Damage[(8d6+21)[healing]] Hit Points and gain +3 item bonus to saving throws against diseases and poisons for 10 minutes.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.lPRuIRbu0rHBkoKY]{Effect: Elixir of Life}

Activate 1 Strike

The bright blue liquid reagents in this vial rapidly absorb heat when exposed to air. A frost vial deals 3d6 cold damage and 3 cold splash damage. On a hit, the target takes a –10-foot status penalty to its Speeds until the end of its next turn. You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls.

@UUID[Compendium.pf2e.equipment-effects.Item.LdmzgBOTjCete4F7]{Effect: Frost Vial}

Upon being mixed and injected into the bloodstream, this powder of the crimson orchid quickly assaults the brain and nerves, disrupting the victim's ability to piece together coherent thoughts and spells.

Activate 3 Interact (Injury)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:32]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[2d6[mental]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[3d6[mental]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 3} (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[4d6[mental]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 4} (1 round)

Purportedly sourced from any number of outlandish locales, nightmare vapor is most often created by boiling the sweat collected from humanoids caught in the throes of terrible nightmares.

Activate A Interact (Inhaled)

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:36]

Onset 1 round

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.yblD8fOR1J8rDwEQ]{Confused} (1 round)

Stage 2 confused and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.AJh5ex99aV6VTggg]{Off-Guard} (1 round)

Stage 3 confused, off-guard, and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.e1XGnhKNSQIm5IXg]{Stupefied 2} (1 round)

Activate 2 (manipulate)

Venom from enormous cave worms leaves a victim weakened.

Saving Throw @Check[fortitude|dc:32]

Maximum Duration 6 rounds

Stage 1 @Damage[5d6[poison]] damage and @UUID[Compendium.pf2e.conditionitems.Item.MIRkyAjyBeXivMa7]{Enfeebled 2} (1 round)

Stage 2 @Damage[6d6[poison]] damage and enfeebled 2 (1 round)

Stage 3 @Damage[8d6[poison]] damage and enfeebled 2 (1 round)

Activate A Strike

This flask filled with corrosive acid deals 1 acid damage, 3d6 persistent acid damage, and 3 acid splash damage. You gain a +2 item bonus to attack rolls.
